headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 18, 2026**
article:
The MLB season continues to heat up with several exciting matchups and roster moves. Here's a look at the top news, injuries, and trades from around the league.

Top News
The Chicago Cubs dominated the New York Mets in a 12-4 victory, with Moisés Ballesteros leading the Mets' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 3 RBIs. The Baltimore Orioles secured a 6-4 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Daniel Schneemann leading the Orioles' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs. The Atlanta Braves shut out the Philadelphia Phillies 9-0, with Austin Riley leading the Braves' offense with two home runs and four RBIs.

Injuries and Availability Impact
Several key players have been placed on the injured list, including Jhoan Duran (Philadelphia Phillies), Jorge Polanco (New York Mets), Patrick Wisdom (Seattle Mariners), Zach McKinstry (Detroit Tigers), and Josh Hader (Houston Astros). The Chicago Cubs have also placed Daniel Palencia on the 15-day injured list with a left oblique strain.

Trades and Roster Movement
The Los Angeles Dodgers traded RHP Axel Perez to the Baltimore Orioles for RHP Chayce McDermott. The New York Mets traded LHP Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash. The Arizona Diamondbacks traded RHP Junior Fernández to the Milwaukee Brewers. The Cincinnati Reds traded 1B Christian Encarnacion-Strand to the Baltimore Orioles for cash.

top_news.title: **Cubs Cruise Past Mets 12-4**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs dominated the New York Mets in a lopsided 12-4 victory, securing their win. Moisés Ballesteros led the Mets' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Guardians 6-4**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 6-4 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Daniel Schneemann leading the Orioles' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs. Rico Garcia earned the win for the Orioles.

top_news.title: **Braves Shut Out Phillies 9-0**
top_news.summary: The Atlanta Braves dominated the Philadelphia Phillies, securing a 9-0 victory. Austin Riley led the Braves' offense with two home runs and four RBIs.

top_news.title: **Giants Take Down Nationals 10-5**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants secured a 10-5 victory over the Washington Nationals, with Logan Webb earning the win. Heliot Ramos led the Giants' offense with a home run and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Yankees Rout Royals 13-4**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees dominated the Kansas City Royals in a lopsided 13-4 victory. Impact hitters for the Yankees included Carter Jensen, Amed Rosario, Cody Bellinger, Ben Rice, José Caballero, and J.C. Escarra, while Will Warren stood out on the mound.

top_news.title: **Reds Edge Twins 5-4 in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a narrow 5-4 victory over the Minnesota Twins, with Eugenio Suárez and Nathaniel Lowe contributing key hits for their respective teams. Josh Bell also made an impact in the game.

top_news.title: **Phillies Place Jhoan Duran on 15-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies have placed right-handed pitcher Jhoan Duran on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 15, 2026, due to a left oblique strain.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Acquire RHP Chayce McDermott in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers have made a move to bolster their pitching staff, acquiring right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott in a trade. McDermott joins the Dodgers after being dealt from the Baltimore Orioles.
